title: Interministerial Group for Work and Pensions
body: "The Interministerial Group discusses matters of mutual interest in the fields of employment support, disability, social security, child maintenance and pensions. It operates within the context of the existing devolution settlement between the UK Government and the Devolved Governments.    This Group has been established as part of the Intergovernmental relations machinery as set out in the Review of intergovernmental relations - GOV.UK. "
